theme-1.name: Polynesian
theme-1.description: Warm volcanic island with carved tiki totems and tribal tattoo patterns
theme-1.motifs: Tiki masks, tribal tattoo patterns, volcanic rock, ocean waves, Polynesian spirals
theme-1.blockMotifs: Wooden tiki faces carved in relief, tribal tattoo etchings, lava crack textures
blockDesigns: A carved wooden tiki mask face with deep-set eyes and wide grinning mouth, warm brown wood grain texture with tribal tattoo scroll patterns
A fierce tiki warrior face with elaborate tribal tattoo etchings across the surface, dark koa wood texture with orange glow highlights
A serene tiki ancestor face with closed eyes and peaceful expression, driftwood texture with turquoise shell inlays and spiral carvings
A volcanic tiki spirit face with glowing lava cracks running through carved obsidian stone, amber and orange molten veins

inspirations: Polynesian tiki carvings and sacred temple totems
Tribal tattoo art and oceanic cultural symbols
textures: dark koa wood grain with natural knots and warm tones
deep-carved tiki grooves and chisel marks
weathered driftwood patina and salt wear
smooth mother-of-pearl shell inlay with iridescent sheen

blocks.centerpiece: carved tiki mask face with deep-set eyes and wide grinning mouth
fierce tiki warrior face with elaborate tattoo etchings
serene tiki ancestor face with closed eyes
volcanic tiki spirit face with glowing lava cracks

theme-1.scene: Volcanic Polynesian island at sunset, carved tiki totems lining a black sand beach, palm trees swaying, glowing lava flows meeting the ocean, dramatic orange sky
theme-1.loadingScene: Close-up of an ancient carved tiki mask with glowing lava cracks, surrounded by fern fronds and volcanic steam rising
theme-1.gridMaterial: Dark volcanic basalt carved with tribal tattoo patterns and lava vein cracks

music.menu: A warm Polynesian lo-fi instrumental with soft ukulele fingerpicking over gentle log drum rhythms and ocean wave ambience. Nose flute melody floats through warm island breeze. Around 90 BPM, rhythmic and inviting.
music.gameplay: An energetic Polynesian war dance instrumental driven by powerful log drum polyrhythms and fast ukulele strumming. Conch shell accents punctuate the rhythm. Around 120 BPM, volcanic and driving.

theme-2.name: Ancient Egypt
theme-2.description: Golden pyramids at dusk with hieroglyph-covered obelisks and sun-drenched sandstone
theme-2.motifs: Hieroglyphs, scarab beetles, Eye of Horus, lotus flowers, ankh symbols, obelisks, papyrus scrolls
theme-2.blockMotifs: Sandstone texture with hieroglyph engravings, gold-lined edges, scarab beetle relief carvings
blockDesigns: A large Eye of Horus hieroglyph carved deeply into warm sandstone, the eye centered and bold with gold-lined details, flanked by smaller hieroglyphic cartouches and papyrus motifs on each side

A winged scarab beetle with wings fully spread as the dominant central emblem, carved in raised relief on deep lapis lazuli blue stone, flanked by symmetrical lotus column decorations and gold accent borders
A bold golden ankh symbol raised in high relief at the center, surrounded by radiating sun-disc rays on a polished gold-leaf surface, flanked by hieroglyphic panel strips and lotus bud accents
A cartouche seal with Pharaonic hieroglyphics as the central medallion, deeply carved into warm terracotta sandstone, flanked by symmetrical cobra (uraeus) serpent motifs and thin gold edge trim

inspirations: Ancient Egyptian temple wall reliefs and carved lintels
Hieroglyphic cartouche panels and papyrus friezes
textures: warm sandstone grain and pores
chisel-cut grooves and engraved channels
subtle stone chips and wear along carvings
smooth metallic gold inlay lines with mild sheen

blocks.centerpiece: winged scarab beetle with wings fully spread
golden ankh symbol with radiating sun-disc rays
blocks.filler: small Eye of Ra accent reliefs

theme-2.scene: Desert twilight, golden pyramids casting long shadows, hieroglyph-covered obelisks, the Nile reflecting amber sky, palm-lined banks, warm sun-drenched atmosphere
theme-2.loadingScene: Close-up of a hieroglyph-covered wall illuminated by golden torchlight, scarab beetle relief with gold leaf details gleaming
theme-2.gridMaterial: Sun-bleached sandstone with faint hieroglyph watermark and gold-lined edge grooves

music.menu: An elegant Egyptian instrumental with a soft oud melody and gentle darbuka hand drum pattern. Arabic maqam Hijaz scale. Around 85 BPM, regal and serene.
music.gameplay: A rhythmic Egyptian fusion instrumental with driving darbuka and riq tambourine groove over punchy bass oud riffs. 115 BPM, monumental and exotic.

theme-3.name: Norse
theme-3.description: Frost-covered viking realm with heavy rune stones, iron-clad shields, and aurora-lit skies
theme-3.motifs: Norse runes, Viking knotwork, longship prows, ravens, Mjolnir, frost patterns, iron rivets
theme-3.blockMotifs: Heavy stone blocks with carved runes, metallic iron frame edges, frost glow crystallization
blockDesigns: A heavy granite rune stone block with deeply carved Norse elder futhark rune, frost crystals forming along the carved grooves, cold blue-grey stone
A dark iron-framed stone block with frost-blue glow seeping from Viking knotwork carvings, metallic rivets at corners, icy blue patina
A weathered dark grey stone block with iron banding and a raven silhouette carved in Norse style, frost-rimmed edges, heavy and cold
A massive pale stone block with Mjolnir relief carving, lightning-blue frost glow filling the engraved channels, silver iron frame

inspirations: Viking rune stones and carved standing stones
Norse knotwork illuminated manuscripts and shield designs
textures: rough grey granite with crystalline specks
deep-carved rune channel grooves with sharp edges
frost crystallization forming along carved edges
dark hammered iron banding with rivet marks

blocks.centerpiece: Viking knotwork medallion with interlace pattern

theme-3.scene: Frozen fjord at night, aurora borealis streaming over snow-covered mountains, viking longships moored at icy docks, rune stones glowing faintly in the snow
theme-3.loadingScene: Close-up of an ancient rune stone covered in frost, each carved rune glowing with faint blue light, snow falling gently
theme-3.gridMaterial: Dark rough-hewn granite with iron frame bands and frost crystallization in the crevices

music.menu: A haunting Norse ambient instrumental with deep bowed string drone and sparse nyckelharpa melody. Distant war horn echoes through frozen valleys. Around 80 BPM, vast and mythic.
music.gameplay: A powerful Viking folk metal instrumental with driving war drum percussion and fierce fiddle melody over heavy bass drone. 118 BPM, relentless and cold.

theme-4.name: Ancient Greece
theme-4.description: White marble temples overlooking the Aegean Sea with elegant Greek-key borders and clean architecture
theme-4.motifs: Greek columns, olive wreaths, Greek-key meander patterns, amphoras, temple pediments, laurel crowns
theme-4.blockMotifs: Clean white marble texture, blue Greek-key border patterns, hairline pressure cracks
blockDesigns: A clean white marble block with carved Greek-key meander border in blue, smooth polished surface with subtle hairline cracks, elegant and minimal
A deep blue block with gold Greek-key border, Aegean blue glazed surface with white marble veining, Hellenic rosette in the center
A warm cream marble block with carved olive wreath relief, subtle golden edge accents, hairline cracks radiating from center
A pale green-grey marble block with Ionic column fluting detail in relief, blue geometric border, architectural precision

inspirations: Ancient Greek temple pediments and Ionic column capitals
Hellenic pottery and Greek-key meander border patterns
textures: smooth polished white marble with subtle grey veining
precision-carved Greek-key channels with clean edges
hairline pressure cracks radiating from relief carvings
blue ceramic glaze with gold leaf accent lines

theme-4.scene: Aegean Sea coastline at golden hour, white marble temple ruins on a cliff, olive groves descending to azure waters, scattered broken columns, blue sky
theme-4.loadingScene: Close-up of a white marble Ionic column capital with fine hairline cracks, warm golden sunlight streaming through, blue sky behind
theme-4.gridMaterial: Polished white marble with faint blue-grey veining and hairline cracks under pressure

music.menu: An elegant Ancient Greek instrumental with gentle lyre arpeggios and soft aulos flute melody over a light frame drum rhythm. Mediterranean breeze ambience. Around 85 BPM, contemplative and noble.
music.gameplay: A rhythmic Mediterranean instrumental with driving frame drum and tambourine over bright lyre patterns and bold aulos melody. 115 BPM, spirited and architectural.

theme-5.name: Feudal Japan
theme-5.description: Black lacquer dojo with red trim, brushstroke calligraphy, and cherry blossom petals
theme-5.motifs: Cherry blossoms, katana blades, torii gates, kanji brushstrokes, bamboo, paper lanterns
theme-5.blockMotifs: Black lacquer with red trim edges, bold brushstroke symbols, sakura petal accents
blockDesigns: A crimson lacquer block with bold white kanji brushstroke character painted across the surface, black trim border, high-gloss reflective finish
A deep black lacquer block with subtle dark blue shimmer, gold inlay brushstroke pattern, thin red trim line at edges, refined and dark
A gleaming gold lacquer block with a black brushstroke enso circle in the center, red corner accents, polished imperial surface
A dark pine-green lacquer block with golden chrysanthemum brushstroke design, black border, cherry blossom petal accent in one corner

inspirations: Japanese urushi lacquerware and maki-e gold designs
Edo period samurai armor motifs and mon emblems
textures: deep glossy lacquer surface with subtle reflections
precise gold leaf brushstroke inlay patterns
fine red trim lines with clean lacquered edges
smooth lacquer surface with hidden wood grain beneath

theme-5.scene: Feudal Japanese castle courtyard at twilight, black and red architecture, cherry blossom trees in full bloom, stone lanterns glowing, zen rock garden
theme-5.loadingScene: Close-up of a glossy black lacquer surface with crimson kanji brushstrokes, cherry blossom petals drifting down, warm paper lantern light
theme-5.gridMaterial: Black lacquered wood with subtle grain texture and thin red trim border lines

music.menu: A refined Japanese instrumental with gentle koto plucking and soft shakuhachi bamboo flute melody over wind chime accents. Around 80 BPM, meditative and disciplined.
music.gameplay: A dramatic taiko drum instrumental with powerful rhythmic patterns and piercing shinobue flute melody. Shamisen strikes punctuate the beat. 120 BPM, intense and dramatic.

theme-6.name: Ancient China
theme-6.description: Imperial jade palace with dragon-scale overlays, golden calligraphy, and mystical mist
theme-6.motifs: Imperial dragons, jade carvings, cloud scrolls, gold calligraphy, pagoda roofs, silk lanterns
theme-6.blockMotifs: Jade texture surface, dragon-scale overlay patterns, gold calligraphy accent strokes
blockDesigns: A polished jade block with dragon-scale overlay texture across the surface, gold calligraphy accent stroke in the center, luminous green translucency
A deep emerald jade block with imperial dragon coil carved in relief, gold-lined edges, rich internal glow like polished stone
A gleaming gold block with imperial dragon silhouette and cloud scroll engravings, dark jade accents, calligraphy border pattern
A cinnabar red lacquer block with golden phoenix feather scale pattern, jade green accent inlays, imperial seal motif in center

inspirations: Imperial Chinese jade carvings and silk brocade patterns
Dragon-scale temple roof ornaments and cloud scroll motifs
textures: luminous polished jade with internal color variations
precision-carved dragon-scale texture overlay
flowing gold calligraphy brush accents
subtle jade translucency glow along thinner edges

blocks.centerpiece: golden phoenix emblem with spread wings
imperial seal with phoenix feather pattern

theme-6.scene: Imperial Chinese palace at night, jade-green rooftops curving skyward, golden silk lanterns lining a marble bridge over misty lotus ponds, dragon statues, moonlit pagodas
theme-6.loadingScene: Close-up of a carved jade dragon head with golden eyes gleaming, mystical mist swirling around it, emerald green luminosity from within
theme-6.gridMaterial: Dark jade stone with subtle dragon-scale texture and thin gold calligraphy vein inlays

music.menu: A mystical Chinese instrumental with gentle guzheng zither arpeggios and soft dizi bamboo flute melody floating over a resonant gong drone. Around 85 BPM, flowing and imperial.
music.gameplay: A dynamic Chinese orchestral instrumental with soaring erhu melody and powerful war drum patterns. Pipa lute runs cascade over thundering timpani. 118 BPM, mystical and commanding.

theme-7.name: Ancient Persia
theme-7.description: Regal Persian palace with blue geometric tile mosaics, golden relief carvings, and luminous symmetry
theme-7.motifs: Geometric tile stars, relief lions, peacocks, cypress trees, arabesques, muqarnas vaults
theme-7.blockMotifs: Blue geometric tile patterns with gold grout lines, golden relief animal carvings, luminous symmetry effects
blockDesigns: A Persian blue ceramic tile block with intricate Islamic geometric star pattern, gold grout lines between shapes, luminous deep blue glaze
A royal blue tile block with golden relief lion carving in proud profile, geometric tile border, symmetrical and regal
A gleaming gold tile block with embossed arabesque floral symmetry pattern, deep blue accent lines, luminous golden surface
A turquoise and teal tile block with golden peacock relief in the center, geometric mosaic border, iridescent glaze highlights

inspirations: Persian geometric tile mosaics and muqarnas vault patterns
Achaemenid palace relief carvings and winged lion motifs
textures: deep blue ceramic glaze with luminous depth
geometric tile pattern with crisp gold grout lines
raised relief animal carvings with burnished gold
iridescent glaze highlights on curved surfaces

blocks.material: deep Persian blue glazed ceramic tile

blocks.centerpiece: golden lion in proud profile relief

theme-7.scene: Persian palace courtyard at night, blue tile domes and minarets glowing under moonlight, reflecting pools mirroring the stars, golden lamplight, cypress gardens
theme-7.loadingScene: Close-up of an intricate Persian blue geometric tile mosaic wall, golden grout lines catching warm lamplight, luminous symmetrical glow
theme-7.gridMaterial: Deep blue ceramic tile with subtle geometric star pattern and thin gold inlay lines between tiles

music.menu: An elegant Persian instrumental with soft santur hammered dulcimer arpeggios and gentle ney flute melody. Zarb hand drum keeps a subtle pulse. Around 85 BPM, regal and luminous.
music.gameplay: A rhythmic Persian fusion instrumental with driving tombak drum patterns and bright tar lute melody. Santur cascades over tight daf frame drum groove. 115 BPM, symmetrical and flowing.

theme-8.name: Mayan
theme-8.description: Dense jungle temple ruins with carved stone, calendar glyphs, and moss-covered ancient masonry
theme-8.motifs: Calendar glyphs, feathered serpents, stepped pyramids, jungle vines, jaguar motifs, obsidian blades
theme-8.blockMotifs: Carved jungle stone with calendar glyph variations, moss growing in the carved crevices
blockDesigns: A carved olive-green jungle stone block with Mayan calendar glyph deeply engraved, moss growing in the carved grooves, weathered and ancient
A warm brown stone block with Aztec feathered serpent relief carving, jungle moss creeping from edges, dense and powerful texture
A dark green stone block with Mayan numeral dots-and-bars system carved in relief, vine tendrils wrapping the corners, deep jungle feel
A khaki-gold stone block with jaguar head glyph carved in profile, obsidian eye inlay glinting, moss and lichen patches at edges

inspirations: Mayan temple carved stone lintels and stela monuments
Calendar glyph panels and feathered serpent architectural reliefs
textures: weathered grey-green limestone with natural pitting
deep-carved glyph channels with moss residue
vine tendril growth creeping into stone crevices
dark obsidian inlay with glassy reflections

theme-8.scene: Deep jungle at dawn, massive stepped Mayan pyramid rising through the canopy, moss-covered stone ruins scattered among giant trees, mist hanging in the air, filtered green light
theme-8.loadingScene: Close-up of a moss-covered carved stone wall with Mayan calendar glyphs, jungle vines creeping over the surface, filtered green light through the canopy
theme-8.gridMaterial: Weathered jungle limestone with moss filling the carved grooves and vine tendrils at edges

music.menu: An atmospheric Mesoamerican instrumental with a wooden pan flute melody over gentle rain stick textures and soft clay drum rhythm. Jungle bird calls in the distance. Around 85 BPM, mysterious and ancient.
music.gameplay: An energetic Aztec ritual instrumental driven by powerful wooden slit drum patterns and rattling seed shakers over fierce clay ocarina melody. 120 BPM, dense and powerful.

theme-9.name: Pueblo
theme-9.description: Adobe desert settlement with turquoise inlays, geometric painted borders, and vast canyon skies
theme-9.motifs: Turquoise stones, eagle feathers, geometric stepped borders, adobe walls, thunderbird motifs, desert sun
theme-9.blockMotifs: Adobe clay texture, turquoise stone inlays, geometric painted border patterns
blockDesigns: An adobe clay block with a turquoise stone inlay in the center, geometric stepped border painted in white and earth tones, warm sun-baked surface
A turquoise-dominated block with adobe clay border frame, geometric Pueblo zigzag patterns painted in white, cool and spiritual
A saddle brown adobe block with thunderbird motif painted in geometric style, turquoise accent dots at corners, warm desert patina
A terra cotta clay block with turquoise and coral inlay mosaic pattern in the center, geometric painted borders in rust and cream

inspirations: Pueblo adobe wall patterns and turquoise jewelry inlays
Southwestern geometric painted pottery and thunderbird motifs
textures: warm sun-baked adobe clay surface with fine grain
geometric painted patterns in earth tones and white
turquoise stone inlay with natural matrix veining
smooth clay surface with subtle finger-smoothed marks

theme-9.scene: Desert mesa at sunset, multi-story adobe pueblo settlement carved into red rock cliffs, turquoise sky fading to orange, vast canyon landscape, scattered sage brush and juniper
theme-9.loadingScene: Close-up of an adobe wall surface with turquoise stone inlays set into geometric painted patterns, warm golden desert light illuminating the texture
theme-9.gridMaterial: Smooth sun-baked adobe clay with faint geometric painted patterns and turquoise inlay fragments

music.menu: A spiritual desert ambient instrumental with soft Native American cedar flute melody over gentle rattle shaker rhythm. Distant canyon wind echoes. Around 80 BPM, earthy and vast.
music.gameplay: A rhythmic Southwestern instrumental with driving hand drum patterns and bright cedar flute runs over steady rattle and bell accents. 115 BPM, grounded and spiritual.

theme-10.name: Inca
theme-10.description: Mountainous stone citadel with interlocking polygonal masonry, sun-god gold highlights, and rope textile accents
theme-10.motifs: Interlocking polygonal stones, Inti sun god disc, quipu rope knots, condor silhouettes, textile weave patterns, mountain terraces
theme-10.blockMotifs: Interlocking polygonal stone masonry with perfect joints, sun-god gold highlight accents, rope and textile border accents
blockDesigns: A warm grey interlocking polygonal stone block with perfectly fitted irregular edges and no mortar, Inca sun-god gold disc accent in center, granite texture
A gleaming gold block with embossed Inti sun rays radiating outward, rope textile border accent at edges, polished ceremonial surface
A cool grey polygonal stone block with a condor relief carved in profile, gold highlight accents along wing feathers, mountainous grey granite
A grey-green stone block with quipu rope knot textile pattern carved as border decoration, gold sun highlights, precise interlocking masonry edges

inspirations: Inca polygonal masonry walls and sun temple stonework
Quipu rope knot textile patterns and condor iconography
textures: precisely fitted grey granite blocks with no mortar
interlocking polygonal stone edges with perfect joints
rope textile weave accents at borders
polished gold ceremonial inlay with warm reflections

blocks.centerpiece: golden Inti sun with radiating rays

theme-10.scene: Mountain citadel at dawn inspired by Machu Picchu, massive interlocking stone walls, terraced hillsides descending into cloud forest, condors soaring over Andes peaks, golden sunrise
theme-10.loadingScene: Close-up of perfectly interlocking polygonal stone wall with a gold Inti sun-god disc embedded in the masonry, morning mist rolling past the stones
theme-10.gridMaterial: Precisely fitted grey polygonal stone masonry with thin gold highlight lines between the interlocking blocks

music.menu: A majestic Andean instrumental with gentle charango melody and soft pan flute harmonies over a steady bombo drum pulse. Mountain wind ambience. Around 85 BPM, monumental and serene.
music.gameplay: A powerful Andean instrumental driven by rapid charango strumming and soaring quena flute over thundering bombo legüero war drums. 120 BPM, precise and mountainous.
